tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: Despite having no evidence, he managed to _________ with the lie for months.
Tom: How did the interview go? Sarah: It _________ that they had already filled the position before I arrived.
I can't _________ with his constant complaining any longer.
While researching for her essay, she _________ across a fascinating article about ancient Rome.
Mark: Why is Lisa so upset? Jane: She's been trying to _________ out why her application was rejected.
The company had to _________ off over two hundred employees due to the financial crisis.
